articles.title: United Airlines flight attendants ratify new contract with 31% raises this summer
articles.summary: United Airlines flight attendants ratify labor deal that would provide first raises in nearly six years.

articles.title: The summer box office is off to a hot start as weekend ticket sales top $160 million
articles.summary: The summer box office is off to a sizzling start, thanks in part to strong week-after-week performance from returning titles.

articles.title: At TV upfronts, AI is in and corporate shuffles are reshaping the lineup
articles.summary: Advertisers will be hearing about the slate of live events in the coming year — and how AI is being integrated. Plus, media consolidation reshapes the lineup.

articles.title: Miała być fuzja gigantów. Utknęła. Rząd zabrał głos
articles.summary: - Jest kilka scenariuszy uwolnienia rezerw kapitałowych w grupie PZU i Pekao obok podstawowego projektu reorganizacji kapitałowej - poinformował w TVP Info minister aktywów państwowych Wojciech Balczun.

articles.title: USA odrzucają propozycję Iranu. Ceny miedzi blisko rekordowych poziomów
articles.summary: Notowania miedzi na giełdzie metali LME w Londynie są blisko rekordowych poziomów w reakcji na odrzucenie przez USA propozycji pokojowej przedstawionej przez Iran - informują maklerzy.

articles.title: While many international brands retreat, McDonald’s is supersizing its China business
articles.summary: McDonald's plans to have 10,000 locations in China by the end of 2028, and the country is its second largest market.

articles.title: Used car prices fall for the first time this year and EV interest rises as gas prices spike
articles.summary: Cox Automotive reports affordability remains a key concern for buyers and that's driving increased demand for older vehicles as well as all-electric vehicles.

articles.title: Meet the YouTube whisperers, a booming class of advisors behind MrBeast and other million-dollar channels
articles.summary: A burgeoning group of YouTube strategists are charging big money to YouTubers who want to expand their popularity.

articles.title: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle
articles.summary: Target is refreshing its baby category as part of a broader effort to offer better products and more convenience to compete with Walmart and Amazon.

articles.title: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
articles.summary: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.

articles.title: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it trims costs, evaluates needs
articles.summary: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.

articles.title: April home sales disappoint as higher mortgage rates weigh on buyers
articles.summary: Home sales barely moved in April, as mortgage rates shot higher the month before and uncertainty over the war with Iran weighed on consumers.

articles.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
articles.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.

articles.title: The wealthy keep buying Manhattan real estate despite potential pied-à-terre tax
articles.summary: Real estate sales in Manhattan worth $4 million or more increased in the past month, according to Olshan Realty.

articles.title: High gas prices are hurting restaurant sales — but not all chains
articles.summary: Restaurant traffic fell 2.3% in March compared with the year-ago period, according to Black Box Intelligence.

articles.title: Dunkin' owner Inspire Brands confidentially files for IPO
articles.summary: The restaurant company owns Dunkin', Arby's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Baskin Robbins, Sonic Drive-In and Jimmy John's.

articles.title: Fitness wearable Whoop to offer on-demand clinician access to U.S. users
articles.summary: Whoop is introducing on-demand clinician access and AI-powered health guidance, largely included in the price of membership.

articles.title: Trump's $1 million 'Gold Card' fails to catch on among the world's wealthy
articles.summary: President Donald Trump's "Gold Card," which promised U.S. residency in "record time," has been dogged by delays and legal questions.

articles.title: States crack down on tax break for wealthy investors
articles.summary: The One Big Beautiful Bill Act turbocharged the tax break on QSBS, but states including New York and Oregon have taken aim at the incentive.
